instructions: This project uses the RIPER workflow with 3 consolidated agents (research-innovate, plan-execute, review). See .claude/project-info.md for detailed context.

project.description: **alertblurty** is a **single-tenant**, self-hosted on-call alert router that works alongside **Zabbix 7.4**. It receives **webhooks from Zabbix**, groups related events (by **host + trigger**) into a single incident, and notifies the active **on-call user** via **Twilio SMS**. When a user **acknowledges** an incident in alertblurty, the app **acknowledges it in Zabbix via API token** and stops further notifications for that grouped incident. alertblurty does **not** implement its own escalation or re-notify logic—**Zabbix controls escalation**; the app reflects state and enables simple, reliable ack + audit.
project.name: alertblurty
